calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Vacated

Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jessica Long, Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. Defendant stated she understood the matter to be moot. JPT stated since moving party did not withdraw the motion, the tentative ruling will be adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted:

Motion to deem admitted DENIED. Defendant served responses to the requests for admission, which Plaintiff acknowledged receiving.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-27-2021 Continued To Feb-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jessica Long, Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court notes Ms. Long did not comply with tentative ruling rule and instructs her to contact Plaintiff's counsel. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC's Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted is continued to February 22, 2021 at 9:00am, Discovery Department.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-07-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
